diffs.replacement:
-- Create table for global habit settings (the default list names)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.habit_settings (
  user_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  habit_names TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT ARRAY['Wake up by 6 AM', 'Exercise / Workout', 'Read 10 pages', 'Deep Work (2 hrs)', 'Drink 3L Water', 'Meditate (10 mins)', 'No Sugar', 'Review Goals', 'Code / Skill Practice', 'Sleep by 11 PM']::TEXT[],
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Create table for daily logs (checks and custom names per date)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.habit_days (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  date DATE NOT NULL,
  checks BOOLEAN[] NOT NULL DEFAULT ARRAY[false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false]::BOOLEAN[],
  custom_names TEXT[] DEFAULT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(user_id, date)
);

-- Enable Row Level Security
ALTER TABLE public.habit_settings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.habit_days ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- Policies for habit_settings
CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own habit settings" 
ON public.habit_settings FOR SELECT 
USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own habit settings" 
ON public.habit_settings FOR INSERT 
WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own habit settings" 
ON public.habit_settings FOR UPDATE 
USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Policies for habit_days
CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR SELECT 
USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR INSERT 
WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR UPDATE 
USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can delete their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR DELETE 
USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

);

### 1. SQL Query (Run in Supabase SQL Editor)

Run this SQL to create the tables and security policies.

```sql
-- 1. Create table for global habit settings (stores default habit names)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.habit_settings (
  user_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  habit_names TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT ARRAY[
    'Wake up by 6 AM', 'Exercise / Workout', 'Read 10 pages', 
    'Deep Work (2 hrs)', 'Drink 3L Water', 'Meditate (10 mins)', 
    'No Sugar', 'Review Goals', 'Code / Skill Practice', 'Sleep by 11 PM'
  ],
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- 2. Create table for daily logs (stores checks and custom habits for specific days)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.habit_days (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  date DATE NOT NULL,
  checks BOOLEAN[] NOT NULL DEFAULT ARRAY[false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false],
  custom_names TEXT[] DEFAULT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(user_id, date) -- Ensures only one record per user per day
);

-- 3. Enable Row Level Security (RLS) to protect data
ALTER TABLE public.habit_settings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.habit_days ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- 4. Create Security Policies for Habit Settings
CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own habit settings" 
ON public.habit_settings FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own habit settings" 
ON public.habit_settings FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own habit settings" 
ON public.habit_settings FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- 5. Create Security Policies for Habit Days
CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Users can delete their own habit days" 
ON public.habit_days FOR DELETE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
```
